annoyingmod.chat.05: A cold wind passes. Oh, it's just a fart.
annoyingmod.chat.06: A group chat is muting you silently.
annoyingmod.chat.07: A mysterious stain tells no lies.
annoyingmod.chat.10: Did you pay the Wi-Fi bill?
annoyingmod.chat.11: Monday is closer than it seems.
annoyingmod.chat.12: Someone ate the last piece of cake.
annoyingmod.chat.14: The GPS says, 'I told you so.'
annoyingmod.chat.17: The bathroom scale clears its throat.
annoyingmod.chat.18: The cat remembers what you did.
annoyingmod.chat.19: The doorbell rings. It's your motivation leaving.
annoyingmod.chat.20: The fridge is judging your life choices.
annoyingmod.chat.22: The toaster refuses to pop up.
annoyingmod.chat.23: You are being outsmarted by a pigeon.
annoyingmod.chat.25: You hear a spoiler in the distance.
annoyingmod.chat.26: You step on a Lego. In the dark.
annoyingmod.chat.27: Your alarm clock smirks at dawn.
annoyingmod.chat.31: A phantom screams. But the sun is high.
annoyingmod.chat.32: Below the lava lake, eyes open.
annoyingmod.chat.33: Footsteps on gravel, but you're alone in the world.
annoyingmod.chat.34: Herobrine cleared the chat. Only you remain.
annoyingmod.chat.36: The Enderman forgives nothing you looked at.
annoyingmod.chat.37: The Warden can smell your heartbeat.
annoyingmod.chat.38: The cave sound was not random this time.
annoyingmod.chat.39: The distant ssss is getting closer.
annoyingmod.chat.40: The door was closed. Now it's open.
annoyingmod.chat.42: The music stopped. The silence breathes.
annoyingmod.chat.43: The nether portal lit itself again.
annoyingmod.chat.44: This seed is corrupted. Stop digging.
annoyingmod.chat.45: You hear a hiss... but there's no creeper.
annoyingmod.chat.46: You hear your own name in the cave echo.
annoyingmod.chat.47: Your bed is missing. Dawn won't save you.
annoyingmod.chat.48: Your torch light doesn't reach the end of the tunnel.
